events.event_description: U.S. Legation in Canberra established when first Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary Clarence Edward Gauss presented credentials.

evidence.quote: Clarence Edward Gauss, Envoy Extraordinary and Minister Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1940-01-12. Credentials presented: 1940-07-17. Left post on 1941-03-05.

events.event_description: Legation Canberra was raised to Embassy status on July 19, 1946, while John Russell Minter was serving as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Minter was serving as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim when Legation Canberra was raised to Embassy status, July 19, 1946.
